query:
SELECT
                CAST(strftime('%Y', created_at) AS INTEGER) as "year!: i32",
                CAST(strftime('%m', created_at) AS INTEGER) as "month!: i32",
                COUNT(*) as "count!: i64"
            FROM photos
            WHERE (user_id IS NULL OR user_id = $1)
              AND trashed_on IS NULL
              AND folder = $2
            GROUP BY 1, 2
            ORDER BY 1 DESC, 2 DESC
